title: edritria linkii
intro: Edritria linkii, also known as the Coral Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions of Australia and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and infections. The health benefits of Edritria linkii include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Edritria linkii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
